reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 triggered: the attack path requires ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE to gradually allowlist enough fee token assets, and trust_assumptions classifies admin_roles as TRUSTED with in_scope_for_bug_bounty: false. No untrusted path independently reaches the gas-exhaustion state — only the admin role can call applyAllowlistedAssetUpdates to grow s_allowlistedAssets. Gate 1 passed (checkUpkeep is a public exported Chainlink Automation interface with external callers outside this repo).
